compiled_state.title: TEST: Write failing behavioral tests for _phase_version_bump in merge-to-main.sh
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

TDD RED phase: write failing behavioral tests for the _phase_version_bump function to be added to merge-to-main.sh.

## TDD Requirement

ALL tests written in this task MUST FAIL (RED) when run against unmodified merge-to-main.sh. Confirm RED before marking complete.

Run: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-merge-to-main-version-bump.sh

## Test Approach

Create tests/scripts/test-merge-to-main-version-bump.sh that:
- Sets up mock bump-version.sh scripts that write call arguments to a tmp file
- Sets up environment variables to simulate _phase_version_bump context (BUMP_TYPE, CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT, MAIN_REPO)
- Sources or executes _phase_version_bump in isolation (either source merge-to-main.sh up to the function, or extract and eval the function body)
- Asserts on: exit code, mock invocation arguments, state file updates, git amend invocation

## Tests to Write (all must FAIL before Task 2)

1. test_version_bump_phase_calls_bump_version_patch_default: BUMP_TYPE=patch -> mock called with --patch
2. test_version_bump_phase_calls_bump_version_minor: BUMP_TYPE=minor -> mock called with --minor
3. test_version_bump_phase_skips_silently_when_no_version_file_path: VERSION_FILE_PATH empty -> exit 0, no mock call
4. test_version_bump_phase_marks_state_complete: after success, state file contains version_bump in completed_phases
5. test_version_bump_phase_exits_nonzero_on_bump_failure: mock bump-version.sh exits 1 -> _phase_version_bump exits non-zero
6. test_merge_to_main_help_includes_bump_flag: --help output includes '--bump' (structural: verify documented)

## File Paths

- Create: tests/scripts/test-merge-to-main-version-bump.sh (chmod +x)
- Read: plugins/dso/scripts/merge-to-main.sh (source under test)
- Read: tests/lib/assert.sh (test harness)

## Fuzzy-Match Note

test-merge-to-main-version-bump.sh normalized -> testmergetomainversionbumpsh
merge-to-main.sh normalized -> mergetomainsh
'mergetomainsh' is a substring of 'testmergetomainversionbumpsh' -> auto-detected by test gate, no .test-index entry needed.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] tests/scripts/test-merge-to-main-version-bump.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-merge-to-main-version-bump.sh
- [ ] bash -n passes on the test file (syntax valid)
  Verify: bash -n $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-merge-to-main-version-bump.sh
- [ ] All 6 tests FAIL (RED) when run against unmodified merge-to-main.sh
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-merge-to-main-version-bump.sh 2>&1 | grep -q FAIL
- [ ] Tests use behavioral assertions (execute code, check outputs/side effects), not grep-on-source assertions
  Verify: manual review of test file — no grep against merge-to-main.sh source for function names
- [ ] Test file uses source "$PLUGIN_ROOT/tests/lib/assert.sh" for assertions
  Verify: grep -q 'assert.sh' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-merge-to-main-version-bump.sh
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (new test file does not break existing suite)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/run-all.sh
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Gap Analysis Amendment (from Step 6)

Add a 7th test to the test file:

7. test_version_bump_phase_idempotent_on_resume: simulate a resume scenario where the version file already shows the bumped version (i.e., origin/main version differs from current working file version). Assert _phase_version_bump exits 0 without calling mock bump-version.sh again.

This test must also FAIL before Task 63b9-5261 implements the idempotency check.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Validation passed ✓ — All 7 test groups FAIL (RED) against unmodified merge-to-main.sh. Existing suite: 109 passed, 1 pre-existing unrelated failure (test-lifecycle-portability.sh)
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — All AC verified: file executable, bash -n passes, FAIL grep passes, behavioral tests (no source grep), uses assert.sh, existing suite unbroken
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: RED tests written and committed. All 7 tests fail as expected.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
